order_not_visible: I’m sorry to hear that, I can’t see your order right now. Please refresh the app and check again.
Try reopening the app and checking your order history. This may help
Please wait a moment and look for a new notification about your order status.
order_stolen: I’m sorry to hear that. Please check around your door or delivery area first.
We are sorry to hear that. Our company can help you request a replacement or refund.
Please report the order as missing so support can investigate the courier’s delivery. We will do our best for our clients interest side
food_damaged: I’m sorry your food arrived damaged. We will find solution
Please send a photo of the order so we can review it.
Tell us what was damaged, and we’ll help with compensation.
greeting: Hello! How can I help with your order today?
Hi! Tell me what happened with your delivery.
Hey! I’m here to help with your food order.
goodbye: Hope your next order goes smoothly!
unknown: I’m not fully sure what happened. Could you describe the order issue in more detail?
Please tell me a bit more about the delivery problem.
I need a little more information to help with your order.
